Writing

Posts

Engineering notes, product announcements, and technical write-ups from the RePass Cloud team.

7 March 2026
Why Most Microsoft 365 Identity Automation Fails in Real Environments
Why Microsoft 365 identity automation often breaks down after the demo phase, and what organisations actually need to make access changes reliable, auditable, schedule-aware, and safe in production.
microsoft 365entra ididentity managementit administration
6 March 2026
Export Microsoft 365 Mailboxes, Aliases, and Sizes with PowerShell
A practical guide to connecting to Exchange Online via PowerShell and exporting a complete mailbox report including primary addresses, aliases, mailbox types, sizes, and item counts to CSV.
powershellmicrosoft 365exchange onlineoffice 365
28 February 2026
We Are Standardizing on AOT for All Console Software
Why Repass Cloud has standardized on Native AOT for all internal CLI and distributed console tooling, covering runtime mechanics, memory behavior, musl considerations, and real-world migration trade-offs.
dotnetaotnativeaotcli
23 February 2026
Using find with -prune to Exclude Directories (Linux / macOS Guide)
Technical guide explaining how to use the find command with -prune to efficiently exclude directories such as node_modules, .git, dist, and build folders.
linuxmacosunixcli
8 January 2024
LunaVPN: Now on ProductHunt - Support Our Vision for a Private and Free Internet!
LunaVPN launches on ProductHunt, introducing private dedicated VPN servers, WireGuard performance, and affordable privacy-focused internet access.
lunavpnproducthuntprivacyvpn
2 January 2024
LunaVPN: General Availability Launch - Embrace Privacy, Embrace Freedom!
LunaVPN launches General Availability, offering secure, high-speed WireGuard VPN connectivity with private servers, global access, and enterprise-grade privacy protection.
lunavpngaonline securityvpn
19 December 2023
Introducing LunaVPN: Your Privacy-Powered Guardian
Technical overview of LunaVPN architecture using .NET, WireGuard, Docker, Auth0, Stripe, and Alpine Linux to build a secure, scalable, privacy-focused VPN service.
blogLunaVPNtechnologyonline privacy
11 December 2023
Embracing the Future: Repass Cloud's Latest Website Redesign
RePass Cloud migrates its website to Hugo, improving performance, deployment speed, and maintainability while modernizing its SaaS platform and digital presence.

Guide to configuring Windows language and regional settings in AutoUnattend.xml, covering InputLocale, SystemLocale, UILanguage, and UserLocale for multilingual environments.
bloglanguage settingsregional settingsWindows configuration
